edge_id.description: Stable short identifier for the entry-to-unit routing edge, typically built from entry_id, edge_type, unit_name, and dispatch_order.

entry_id.description: Primary key of the public API entry.

unit_id.description: Primary key of the execution unit reached by this routing edge.

edge_type.description: Routing topology type of this entry-to-unit edge.

dispatch_order.description: Stable ordering index among candidate edges under the same entry.

resolver_type.description: Mechanism used to resolve this entry-to-unit edge.

resolver_path.description: Source file path that provides the routing evidence for this edge.

match_condition.description: Optional textual condition describing when this candidate edge is selected.

target_symbol.description: Optional internal symbol reached by this edge, such as a py_method, alias target, or registry target.
